name: autonomous_script
description: Writes and executes a local Python script to solve a specific problem or automate a task. Requires user confirmation.

description.description: A brief description of what the script does.

save_as_tool.description: If provided, saves this script as a permanent tool with this name.

tool_description.description: The description for the new permanent tool.

examples: Write a script to convert all JPGs in my folder to PNG
Calculate the Fibonacci sequence up to 100
